name: Wa Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Wa Shogi (和将棋): a large 11x11 traditional Shogi variant where all 27 pieces per side are named for animals and birds -- Crane King, Cloud Eagle, Treacherous Fox, Running Rabbit, Violent Wolf, Sparrow Pawns and more. Pieces promote in the far three ranks. This is the classic DROP-LESS ruleset (captured pieces leave play).
